summary: Modern threats move faster than human response, demanding systems that can sense, decide, and act in real time. USAvionix delivers an AI command layer and edge-native autonomous drones that fuse data, orchestrate swarms, and execute missions under pressure without cloud dependence. Built for contested environments, Phalanx and Delta transform raw sensor inputs into decisive action at the edge. The result is autonomous defense and public safety infrastructure designed to protect what matters when speed is everything.
document_purpose: Secure seed capital to complete a first autonomous prototype and advance the platform toward deployment.
ask: Raising $3M to complete the first autonomous prototype.
